name: Beom Golf
about: Beom Golf offers an indoor virtual golf simulator experience in a state-of-the-art facility located in Buena Park, California. Their advanced simulators utilize cutting-edge technology to capture every detail of a golfer's swing, providing an immersive and realistic environment for players of all skill levels. The facility features a modern, spacious layout with 13 public bays for general use and 2 private bays for groups or personalized lessons. Golfers can enjoy playing 9 or 18-hole rounds on simulators featuring renowned courses from Korea, with detailed feedback on their game to help improve skills.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology provides detailed swing analysis and realistic course play
Spacious facility with 13 public bays and 2 private bays for various needs
Located near Knott's Berry Farm with easy access from the 91 freeway and ample parking

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food services

faq.answer: There is no mention of a BYOB policy or food restrictions, but no on-site dining options are described.

faq.answer: The exact time for 18 holes is not specified, but simulators allow for 9 or 18-hole rounds on Korean courses.
